    void
    MicroserviceLambdaService.mount(String lambdaName, com.telenav.kivakit.core.version.Version lambdaVersion, Class<? extends MicroservletRequest> requestType)
    Exposes the given AWS Lambda function by name and version by creating a mapping to the class of the MicroservletRequest that should handle requests for the Lambda function.

    MicroserviceRestService.mount(com.telenav.kivakit.core.version.Version version, String path, MicroserviceRestService.HttpMethod method, Class<Request> requestType)
    Mounts the given request handler on the path /api/[version]/path
    <Request extends MicroservletRequest, Response extends MicroservletResponse>
    void
    MicroserviceRestService.mount(String path, MicroserviceRestService.HttpMethod method, Class<Request> requestType)

    <Request extends MicroservletRequest, Response extends MicroservletResponse>
    void
    MicroserviceRestService.mountApi(com.telenav.kivakit.core.version.Version version, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.Resource jar, String commandLine, int port)
    Mounts the given JAR on the path specified by MicroserviceRestService.versionToPath(Version).
    <Request extends MicroservletRequest, Response extends MicroservletResponse>
    void
    MicroserviceRestService.mountApi(com.telenav.kivakit.core.version.Version version, String path, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.Resource jar, String commandLine, int port)
    Mounts the given JAR on the given path for the given HTTP method.
    <Request extends MicroservletRequest, Response extends MicroservletResponse>
    Response
    MicroserviceRestClient.post(String path, Class<Response> responseType)
    Convenience method when "posting" a JSON object using path parameters
    <Request extends MicroservletRequest, Response extends MicroservletResponse>
    Response
    MicroserviceRestClient.post(String path, Class<Response> responseType, Request request)
    Uses HTTP POST to write the given object to read a JSON object of the given type from the given path.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MicroserviceRestService.onRequested(MicroservletRequest request, MicroserviceRestService.HttpMethod method)
    Called for every request to this rest service after producing a response
    void
    MicroserviceRestService.onRequesting(MicroservletRequest request, MicroserviceRestService.HttpMethod method)
    Called for every request to this rest service, before activity begins on producing a response
